title: Davik's Visor
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Davik_Visor.jpg|thumb|right|200px|[[Revan/Legends|Revan]] wearing Davik's visor]]
'''Davik's visor''' was a personalized visor used by [[Davik Kang]], leader of the [[Exchange]] on [[Taris/Legends|Taris]] to focus on the target when using a blaster.

While [[Darth Malak]] [[Destruction of Taris|attacked the planet]], [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] took the visor and [[Davik's war suit|armor]] before he boarded the ''[[Ebon Hawk]]''.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}

|pl=Gogle Davika
